daily_reality.typical_day: Manages 3 large customer projects. Coordinates between Konstruktion, Fertigung, and Montage departments. Schedules weekly Jour-Fixe with each customer. Uses Outlook (company mandate). Fights with Outlook's scheduling assistant daily.
daily_reality.biggest_time_waste: Scheduling cross-department meetings: 4 departments, 12 people, no shared availability view. Customers insist on specific times. Rescheduling cascades when one person cancels.

psychology.tech_savviness: medium — competent with business tools but not technical
psychology.risk_tolerance: low — needs IT department approval for any new tool
psychology.decision_speed: slow — needs to convince IT, then Geschäftsführung, then train team
frustration_triggers: only works with Google (company uses Outlook)
requires each user to create an account
delight_triggers: works without individual accounts for guests
branded booking pages with company logo

first_screen: German welcome, clear value proposition for Mittelstand
Pricing in Euros, transparent, no hidden costs
must_have: DSGVO compliance with documentation for IT department
Admin dashboard for IT to manage users
deal_breakers: Guests must create an account to book
expectations.current_pain_level: 7/10 — Outlook scheduling assistant is painful for external meetings, especially with customers
